ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's assistant coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Team logo URL or file path */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary team colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., home, away, neutral) */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the metric belongs to */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills in the game */,
  "attacks" INTEGER /* Number of attacks in the game */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts in the game */,
  "attack_percentage" REAL /* Attack percentage for the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks in the game */,
  "digs" INTEGER /* Number of digs in the game */,
  "service_errors" INTEGER /* Number of service errors in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the player (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the metric belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the metric belongs to */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player in the game */,
  "attacks" INTEGER /* Number of attacks by the player in the game */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "digs" INTEGER /* Number of digs by the player in the game */,
  "service_errors" INTEGER /* Number of service errors by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the standing belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the standing belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties by the team in the season */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of conference wins by the team in the season */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of conference losses by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game note */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_notes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_text" TEXT /* Text of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the playoff belongs to */,
  "playoff_round" TEXT /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., championship, semifinals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
